import { spec, specId } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// Envelope hard error: a hand-authored piece of derived graph vocabulary impersonates machine
// truth (the extraction-layer twin of authoring-shape honesty), so the spec is not extracted.
export const reservedPropertySpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.reserved-property"),
  title: "Spec hand-authoring derived graph vocabulary",
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "story",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: "Pin the reserved-property hard error." },
  deliveryFacts: ["implemented"],
});
